name: Yoga with Emily
description:
Yoga every Monday during school time: 7pm - 8pm.

Monday Evening Yoga with Emily.

This is a yoga class where you will be welcomed as you are - with no expectations or judgements. We move to find space, ease and stability in the body and to still the mind by connecting our movement to our breath. We always finish with a nurturing guided relaxation.

Classes are £10 and work on a drop in basis (no need to book).

If you'd like to find out more, please contact Emily: emswilkin@hotmail.com

name: Pilates 4 Everyone
description:
Join me on a Monday morning:

9.15-10.15am Mixed Ability Pilates
10.30-11.30am Pilates4mamma&baby

You don’t need to be flexible, fit or experienced to come to Pilates 🤍

My classes focus on moving well, building strength gradually and supporting your body at your own pace. They’re friendly, inclusive and suitable for all ages and abilities, with options given throughout.

If you’ve been thinking about trying Pilates locally, I’d love to welcome you to one of my village hall classes 🌿

To know more visit:
www.pilates4everyone.co.uk

To book please email:
emma@pilates4everyone.co.uk

name: Shalford Cubs
description:
Cub Scouts are young people aged between 8 and 10 and a half.

Go on adventures, learn new skills, gain skills for life and help others!

We meet: Thursday 6.45pm-8:00pm

For more information or to join our waiting list please use the link:
https://shalfordscouts.org.uk/Join/

name: Community Cinema
description:
Different film each month, friendly relaxed setting, drinks and ice cream available, £5 on the door.

Email: cccinema17@outlook.com

name: Boogie Pumps
description:
At Boogie Pumps, we believe that dance should be both fun and accessible, which is why our classes are structured to provide a positive, supportive, and enjoyable experience.

Our expert teachers ensure that every child feels welcome, encouraged, and excited to learn. From toddlers to teens, we offer classes that focus on building confidence, developing skills, and most importantly, having fun while dancing.

Find out more:
https://boogiepumps.co.uk/timetable/

name: Shalford Beavers
description:
Beaver Scouts are young people aged between 6 and 8 years old.

Master new skills, have fun, make friends and help other people on your doorstep and beyond.

We meet: Monday 5.45pm-6.45pm

For more information or to join our waiting list please use the link:
https://shalfordscouts.org.uk/Join/

name: Ballet
summary: Private tuition with Anya Grinstead for students of Ballet.
